name: switch-connection
description: Switch to a different MongoDB connection. If the user has configured a connection string or has previously called the connect tool, a connection is already established and there's no need to call this tool unless the user has explicitly requested to switch to a new instance.

connectionString.description: MongoDB connection string to switch to (in the mongodb:// or mongodb+srv:// format). If a connection string is not provided, the connection string from the config will be used.
